ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "trade_seq" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the trade within the batch */,
  "date_utc" TEXT /* UTC date and time of the trade */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the trade */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the trade (buy/sell) */,
  "index_price" REAL /* Index price at the time of the trade */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Identifier for the financial instrument (e.g., BTC-10MAY19-6000-C) */,
  "iv" REAL /* Implied volatility at the time of the trade */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the trade */,
  "tick_direction" INTEGER /* Tick direction (0: zero, 1: plus tick, 2: minus tick, 3: zero minus tick) */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Unix timestamp of the trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the trade */,
  "execution_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the execution of the trade */,
  "leverage" REAL /* Leverage used for the trade */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee charged for the trade */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., long, short) */,
  "strategy_id" TEXT /* ID of the trading strategy used */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when the trade was executed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to execute the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument FOREIGN KEY ("instrument") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument (e.g., BTC-10MAY19-6000-C) */,
  "underlying_asset" TEXT /* Underlying asset (e.g., BTC) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the instrument */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price of the option */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* Type of the option (call/put) */,
  "contract_size" REAL /* Size of the contract */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the instrument */,
  "tick_size" REAL /* Minimum price movement (tick size) */,
  "lot_size" REAL /* Number of units in a trading lot */,
  "last_trading_date" TEXT /* Last date on which the instrument can be traded */,
  "settlement_type" TEXT /* Type of settlement (e.g., physical, cash) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, admin, guest) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "KYC_status" TEXT /* Status of Know Your Customer (KYC) verification */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* ID of the instrument the order is for */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of the order (market/limit) */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side of the order (buy/sell) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (open, executed, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was created */,
  "executed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was executed */,
  "canceled_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was canceled */,
  "leverage" REAL /* Leverage used for the order */,
  "stop_loss_price" REAL /* Stop loss price for the order */,
  "take_profit_price" REAL /* Take profit price for the order */,
  "order_reference" TEXT /* Reference or identifier for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* ID of the instrument */,
  "index_price" REAL /* Index price of the instrument */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last traded price of the instrument */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Current bid price of the instrument */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* Current ask price of the instrument */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of trades for the instrument */,
  "open_interest" REAL /* Open interest of the instrument */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument during the period */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price since the last period */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Change in volume since the last period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., cash, margin) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "leverage_limit" REAL /* Maximum leverage allowed for the account */,
  "margin_balance" REAL /* Margin balance of the account */,
  "equity" REAL /* Equity of the account */,
  "available_margin" REAL /* Available margin in the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading account */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal, trade) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "balance_after" REAL /* Balance of the account after the transaction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transaction */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference or identifier for the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES trading_accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Preferred timezone of the user */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Notification preferences of the user */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Preferred theme of the user interface */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to preferences */,
  "chart_preferences" TEXT /* Preferences for chart settings */,
  "alert_settings" TEXT /* Settings for alerts and notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the role assignment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "max_leverage" REAL /* Maximum leverage allowed for the user */,
  "stop_loss_threshold" REAL /* Stop loss threshold for the user */,
  "take_profit_threshold" REAL /* Take profit threshold for the user */,
  "margin_call_threshold" REAL /* Margin call threshold for the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to risk management settings */,
  "risk_profile" TEXT /* Risk profile of the user (e.g., conservative, aggressive) */,
  "trading_limits" TEXT /* Trading limits for the user (e.g., maximum trade size) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of the trading strategy (e.g., trend following, mean reversion) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the strategy was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the strategy */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the strategy */,
  "backtest_results" TEXT /* Backtest results of the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_executions" (
  "execution_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each strategy execution */,
  "strategy_id" TEXT /* ID of the trading strategy */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade executed by the strategy */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order executed by the strategy */,
  "executed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the strategy was executed */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the execution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the execution (e.g., executed, failed) */,
  "execution_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_executions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_executions_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_executions_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_parameters" (
  "strategy_id" TEXT /* ID of the trading strategy */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id", "parameter_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_analytics" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* ID of the instrument */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the trade */,
  "return_on_investment" REAL /* Return on investment of the trade */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., long, short) */,
  "strategy_id" TEXT /* ID of the trading strategy used */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha of the trade */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the trade */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the trade */,
  "sortino_ratio" REAL /* Sortino ratio of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_analytics_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_analytics_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* ID of the instrument */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of the trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price during the trend */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Percentage change in volume during the trend */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the trend */,
  "trend_strength" REAL /* Strength of the trend */,
  "technical_indicators" TEXT /* Technical indicators associated with the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)
